HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF MONEY JUDGMENT. THE COURT ORDERS: BY NOVEMBER 16, 2011, PLAINTIFF IS TO SUBMIT RECEIPTS/INVOICES THAT RELATE TO DISCUSSED CREDIT. ON NOVEMBER 17, 2011 (OR WHENEVER THE COURT HAS BEEN NOTIFIED THAT REQUESTED RECEIPTS/INVOICES WERE SUBMITTED AS ORDERED ABOVE) THE COURT WILL SIGN PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW, NOT REPORTED, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA (608).
